subject: [PATCH pynfs 01/13] server41tests: add helpers and basic synchronous COPY test

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds helpers to reduce boilerplate in COPY tests, including functions to split I/O into pieces bounded by the session's negotiated ca_maxrequestsize/ca_maxresponsesize and a basic synchronous COPY test. The test writes 64KB to a source file, copies it, and verifies the destination contents, handling cases where the server downgrades from synchronous to asynchronous copy.
